channel.title: Inference — AI Newsletter
channel.description: The signal in the noise. Curated AI trends, tools, and research — updated every Monday.

item.title: OpenAI defeats xAI’s trade secrets lawsuit
item.description: The OpenAI story has enough signal to track — file it for your next planning round (via The Verge AI).
item.author: Hayden Field

item.title: OpenAI announces Frontier Alliance Partners
item.description: Depending on your setup, OpenAI might save you time or headaches down the line (via OpenAI Blog).

item.title: Hierarchical Reward Design from Language: Enhancing Alignment of Agent Behavior with Human Specifications
item.description: If Hierarchical Reward Design pans out, it could change how teams approach their current stack (via arXiv CS.AI).
item.author: Zhiqin Qian, Ryan Diaz, Sangwon Seo et al.

item.title: Anthropic won’t budge as Pentagon escalates AI dispute
item.description: Not a fire drill, but Anthropic is the kind of thing that compounds if you ignore it (via TechCrunch AI).
item.author: Rebecca Bellan

item.title: Meta could end up owning 10% of AMD in new chip deal
item.description: If Meta pans out, it could change how teams approach their current stack (via Ars Technica AI).
item.author: Michael Acton, Financial Times

item.title: Apple Researchers Introduce Ferret-UI Lite, an On-Device AI Model for Seeing and Controlling UIs
item.description: New model work on Ferret-UI Lite, an On-Device AI Model could shift the cost-quality tradeoff — benchmark against your baseline (via InfoQ).
item.author: Sergio De Simone

item.title: How to Hide Google’s AI Overviews From Your Search Results
item.description: Concrete enough to follow along — the Hide Google tutorial goes beyond toy examples (via Wired AI).
item.author: Reece Rogers

item.title: Will Claude Code Be Dead by Summer?
item.description: Not the binary, but the relevance.
item.author: Jeff Cameron

item.title: llmfit
item.description: The llmfit story has enough signal to track — file it for your next planning round (via GitHub Trending (AI/ML)).
item.author: AlexsJones

item.title: Uber engineers built an AI version of their boss
item.description: If Uber pans out, it could change how teams approach their current stack (via TechCrunch AI).
item.author: Kirsten Korosec

item.title: Spanish ‘soonicorn’ Multiverse Computing releases free compressed AI model
item.description: The Spanish model release is worth testing against what you're running now (via TechCrunch AI).
item.author: Anna Heim

item.title: How we built Agent Builder’s memory system
item.description: If Agent Builder pans out, it could change how teams approach their current stack (via LangChain Blog).
item.author: LangChain Accounts

item.title: Alibaba Qwen Team Releases Qwen 3.5 Medium Model Series: A Production Powerhouse Proving that Smaller AI Models are Smarter
item.description: The Alibaba Qwen Team scaling approach may offer lessons for teams hitting similar bottlenecks (via MarkTechPost).
item.author: Asif Razzaq

item.title: AI Impact Summit 2026
item.description: Not a fire drill, but AI Impact Summit is the kind of thing that compounds if you ignore it (via Google AI Blog).
